agent_guidance: Prospect research kept clustering around missed follow-up, spreadsheet CRM use, and manual reminder pain.
profitability_note: This narrows the product to a recurring workflow that agencies and operators can justify paying for because it reduces missed revenue and admin overhead.
summary: Added the first CRM slice with an authenticated follow-up queue, overdue and due-today visibility, and a next-action surface for leads.
title: Lead follow-up workspace

agent_guidance: The agent was more useful when we constrained it to CRM-adjacent operator pain rather than generic startup ideas.
profitability_note: Better research targeting improves the odds that we build a narrow workflow with recurring demand instead of a vague all-in-one CRM.
summary: Tuned the prospect agent toward lead follow-up, pipeline hygiene, relationship memory, and token tracking so it can guide CRM scope instead of broad SaaS hunting.
title: CRM-direction prospecting profile

agent_guidance: The missing piece was not just more ideas, but a tighter loop between what the agent finds and what we actually ship.
profitability_note: A daily feedback loop keeps experimentation grounded in recurring pain and helps us avoid wandering into high-support, low-ROI features.
summary: Added a daily email briefing that summarizes prospect-agent guidance, tracked product updates, and whether the roadmap is converging on a profitable CRM wedge.
title: Daily operator briefing
